prompt: Turn the official Google Home Speaker product photograph into a clean, warm residential editorial cover about using this exact 2026 speaker as a Thread border router with Home Assistant. Preserve the speaker exactly: same squat rounded shape, pale sage woven fabric, white base, physical proportions, grille texture, scale, and camera realism. Place it on an understated warm-oak living-room console with natural plaster, one restrained dark-green accent, soft residential depth, and late-morning window light. Keep the device fully visible and safe at a 16:9 article-card crop. Remove all visible book lettering. No humans, headline, title, readable text, logos, watermark, diagrams, charts, network lines, signal waves, app screens, translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, progress bars, decorative tech overlays, glowing nodes, generic AI illustration, or invented hardware.
source_image_role: Official Google Store product photograph used as the authoritative edit target
